notes:
What's new in 1.3.1:
- Adds an always-on high-level app log at %LOCALAPPDATA%\LogLens\logs\app.log for lifecycle, connection, log-list refresh, and update workflow events.
- Normal app log entries are single-line, fixed-width pipe aligned, redacted, and include explicit outcomes such as current, needs update, success, and error.
- Detailed HTTP diagnostics remain opt-in through Tools > Diagnostics Logging, while normal logging now captures enough context to troubleshoot issues that happened before diagnostics were enabled.

Also new in 1.3.0 (if upgrading from 1.2.9 or earlier):
- Search now defaults Message Type to All Message Types so Supplies and Procurement searches can cover every known request type for the selected business event.
- The Search results grid now includes a sortable, filterable Message Type column to show which request type each match came from.
- Changing Business Event or using Reset Search returns Message Type to All Message Types.
